judgment.summary: A dominant retailer with solid cash flow and analyst support, but facing margin pressure and slowing growth.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 1.8%; next earnings date is 2026-05-21.
positives: Market cap $969B — a dominant player in retail.
Free cash flow $10.55B TTM — strong cash generation.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a mean target of $137.78.
Return on equity 21.8% — efficient use of shareholder capital.
negatives: Earnings growth -19.0% YoY and quarterly earnings growth -19.4% — significant profit decline.
Operating margin 4.6% and Profit margin 3.1% — thin margins susceptible to cost pressures.
Forward P/E 36.92x and PEG ratio 4.88x — valuation appears stretched given recent earnings performance.
Current ratio 0.79 and Quick ratio 0.20 — liquidity could be a concern.

news.paragraph: Walmart stock is trading lower today after the company guided below expectations, citing the impact of high gas prices on consumer spending. Despite the near-term headwinds and a slight miss on earnings growth last quarter, the company maintains a strong buy consensus from analysts with a high average target price. Traders should monitor commentary around consumer behavior and inventory levels during today's earnings call.

headlines.title: Walmart Stock Falls As Dow Giant Guides Low Amid High Gas Prices
Walmart Inc. (WMT) Backed by Wall Street and Louis Navellier
